body:
## Summary
This PR updates the Login and Register pages with a dark fantasy card-game visual style. It adds new page assets, improves logo usage, and adjusts layout spacing to work with the responsive navbar.
## Changes
This PR redesigns the Login page UI, adds transparent logo usage, and introduces character carousel visuals. It also redesigns the Register page with a different layout, including a full-page fantasy background, an animated crystal video, and benefit sections with elemental icons. The page background handling was also updated to avoid white gaps, and responsive layout adjustments were made for small laptop screens around 1366/1370 × 768.
## Testing
I ran `npm run build` successfully. I also checked the Login page, Register page, navbar spacing, page background alignment, and small laptop layout around 1366/1370 × 768.
## Notes
The existing login and register logic was preserved. This PR mainly focuses on UI styling, page assets, visual layout, and responsive presentation.

## 中文说明
本 PR 更新了 Login 和 Register 页面，整体改为暗黑幻想卡牌游戏风格。新增了页面图片和视频资源，优化了 logo 使用，并调整了页面布局，使其能够配合响应式 navbar 正常显示。
## 改动内容
本 PR 重新设计了 Login 页面 UI，添加了透明 logo 的使用，并加入了角色轮播视觉效果。同时，Register 页面采用了不同于 Login 页面的布局，包含全屏幻想背景图、水晶动画视频，以及带有元素图标的功能介绍区域。页面背景处理也进行了调整，避免出现白色间隙，并针对 1366/1370 × 768 左右的小屏笔记本尺寸优化了响应式布局。
## 测试
已成功运行 `npm run build`。同时检查了 Login 页面、Register 页面、navbar 间距、页面背景衔接效果，以及 1366/1370 × 768 左右的小屏笔记本布局。
title: Feat/login register UI
